title: Confederacy (disambiguation)
content:
'''Confederacy''' or '''confederation''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Confederacy of Corporate Systems]]''', a [[The galaxy|galactic]] [[Politics|government]] that rose to prominence in around [[5 ABY]].
*The '''[[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]''', a government of [[star system]]s that broke away from the [[Galactic Republic]].
*The '''[[Lower Mantle Confederacy]]''' that was active during the [[Galactic Civil War]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Calian Confederacy]]'''.
*The '''[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]'''.
*The '''[[Confederation]]''', which governed the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].
*The '''[[Empire of the Hand]]'''.
*The '''[[Granse Confederacy]]'''.
*The '''[[Indrexu Confederation]]'''.
*The '''[[Marzoon Confederation]]'''.
*The '''[[Ossiki Confederacy Army]]'''.
*The '''[[Qektoth Confederation]]'''.
*The '''[[Ossiki Confederacy]]'''.
*The '''[[Renatasian Confederation]]'''.
*The '''[[Smugglers' Confederation]]'''.
*'''[[Thrawn's confederation]]'''.
*The '''[[Yedagon Confederacy]]'''.
*The '''[[Pirate Confederation]]'''.
*The '''[[Xal 3 Armorers' Confederacy]]'''.

{{Disambig}}
